name: Vouchers & Journal Entry
script:
# Server Script: Create Journal Entry for Vouchers Entry v4.0
# الحالة: يتم التنفيذ عند الترحيل (After Submit)

if not doc.journal_entry:
    # 1. إنشاء رأس قيد اليومية وتعبئة البيانات الأساسية
    je = frappe.new_doc("Journal Entry")
    je.posting_date = doc.posting_date
    je.company = doc.company
    je.cheque_date = doc.posting_date
    je.cheque_no = doc.name
    je.user_remark = doc.remarks
    je.voucher_type = "Journal Entry"
    je.project = doc.custom_project

    # متغير لجلب حساب الضريبة
    tax_account = None
    
    # --- الحالة الأولى: استلام (Receive) ---
    if doc.payment_type == "Receive":
        # أ. الطرف المدين: الحساب الرئيسي (البنك/الخزينة)
        je.append("accounts", {
            "account": doc.account_payment,
            "debit_in_account_currency": frappe.utils.flt(doc.amount_after_tax),
            "credit_in_account_currency": 0,
            "cost_center": doc.cost_center
        })

        # ب. الطرف الدائن: توزيع العميل والربط بفواتير المبيعات
        for row in doc.references:
            total_allocated_for_this_row = 0
            
            # البحث في جدول vouchers_payment_references (الخاص بالاستلام)
            if doc.get("vouchers_payment_references"):
                for alloc in doc.get("vouchers_payment_references"):
                    if alloc.customer == row.party:
                        je.append("accounts", {
                            "account": row.account,
                            "party_type": row.party_type,
                            "party": row.party,
                            "credit_in_account_currency": frappe.utils.flt(alloc.allocated_amount),
                            "debit_in_account_currency": 0,
                            "reference_type": alloc.reference_doctype,
                            "reference_name": alloc.reference_name,
                            "cost_center": row.cost_center,
                            "project": doc.custom_project,
                            "user_remark": row.user_remark
                        })
                        total_allocated_for_this_row = total_allocated_for_this_row + frappe.utils.flt(alloc.allocated_amount)
            
            # جـ. المتبقي للعميل (بدون ربط)
            remaining_amount = frappe.utils.flt(row.amount_before_tax) - total_allocated_for_this_row
            if remaining_amount > 0:
                je.append("accounts", {
                    "account": row.account,
                    "party_type": row.party_type,
                    "party": row.party,
                    "credit_in_account_currency": remaining_amount,
                    "debit_in_account_currency": 0,
                    "cost_center": row.cost_center,
                    "project": doc.custom_project,
                    "user_remark": row.user_remark
                })
            if not tax_account and row.taxes:
                tax_account = frappe.db.get_value("Purchase Taxes and Charges", {"parent": row.taxes}, "account_head")

        # د. حساب الضريبة (دائن)
        if tax_account and frappe.utils.flt(doc.total_taxes) > 0:
            je.append("accounts", {
                "account": tax_account,
                "credit_in_account_currency": frappe.utils.flt(doc.total_taxes),
                "debit_in_account_currency": 0,
                "cost_center": doc.cost_center
            })

    # --- الحالة الثانية: دفع (Pay) ---
    elif doc.payment_type == "Pay":
        # أ. الطرف الدائن: الحساب الرئيسي (البنك/الخزينة)
        je.append("accounts", {
            "account": doc.account_payment,
            "credit_in_account_currency": frappe.utils.flt(doc.amount_after_tax),
            "debit_in_account_currency": 0,
            "cost_center": doc.cost_center
        })

        # ب. الطرف المدين: توزيع المورد والربط بفواتير المشتريات
        for row in doc.references:
            total_allocated_for_this_row = 0
            
            # البحث في جدول vouchers_payment_references2 (الخاص بالدفع)
            if doc.get("vouchers_payment_references2"):
                for alloc in doc.get("vouchers_payment_references2"):
                    # ملاحظة: تم استخدام suppiler حسب تسميتك في الحقل
                    if alloc.suppiler == row.party:
                        je.append("accounts", {
                            "account": row.account,
                            "party_type": row.party_type,
                            "party": row.party,
                            "debit_in_account_currency": frappe.utils.flt(alloc.allocated_amount),
                            "credit_in_account_currency": 0,
                            "reference_type": alloc.reference_doctype,
                            "reference_name": alloc.reference_name,
                            "cost_center": row.cost_center,
                            "project": doc.custom_project,
                            "user_remark": row.user_remark
                        })
                        total_allocated_for_this_row = total_allocated_for_this_row + frappe.utils.flt(alloc.allocated_amount)

            # جـ. المتبقي للمورد (بدون ربط)
            remaining_amount = frappe.utils.flt(row.amount_before_tax) - total_allocated_for_this_row
            if remaining_amount > 0:
                je.append("accounts", {
                    "account": row.account,
                    "party_type": row.party_type,
                    "party": row.party,
                    "debit_in_account_currency": remaining_amount,
                    "credit_in_account_currency": 0,
                    "cost_center": row.cost_center,
                    "project": doc.custom_project,
                    "user_remark": row.user_remark
                })
            if not tax_account and row.taxes:
                tax_account = frappe.db.get_value("Purchase Taxes and Charges", {"parent": row.taxes}, "account_head")

        # د. حساب الضريبة (مدين)
        if tax_account and frappe.utils.flt(doc.total_taxes) > 0:
            je.append("accounts", {
                "account": tax_account,
                "debit_in_account_currency": frappe.utils.flt(doc.total_taxes),
                "credit_in_account_currency": 0,
                "cost_center": doc.cost_center
            })

    # --- الحالة الثالثة: تحويل داخلي (Internal Transfer) ---
    elif doc.payment_type == "Internal Transfer":
        je.append("accounts", {"account": doc.paid_from, "debit_in_account_currency": frappe.utils.flt(doc.paid_amount), "credit_in_account_currency": 0, "cost_center": doc.cost_center})
        je.append("accounts", {"account": doc.paid_to, "credit_in_account_currency": frappe.utils.flt(doc.paid_amount), "debit_in_account_currency": 0, "cost_center": doc.cost_center})

    # 2. الحفظ والترحيل وربط القيد
    if je.accounts:
        je.insert(ignore_permissions=True)
        je.submit()
        doc.db_set("journal_entry", je.name)

name: Cancel Vouchers & Journal Entry
Delete Vouchers & Journal Entry
